messages.content: Will I need a jacket this afternoon?

Summarize what I copied, but only grab the first 2000 characters

Remind me tomorrow at 5pm to call the dentist
Add buy cat food and note that Costco has the cheapest one

Ask Cursor to refactor the todo manager into smaller helper methods
[{"name":"cursor_composer","arguments":{"prompt":"Refactor the todo manager into smaller helper methods while preserving behavior."}}]
Use Cursor to add tests for todo scheduling edge cases
[{"name":"cursor_composer","arguments":{"prompt":"Add tests that cover todo scheduling edge cases, especially natural language due times and event-relative reminders."}}]
Send a Composer prompt to add hover tooltips to the todo overlay
[{"name":"cursor_composer","arguments":{"prompt":"Add hover tooltips to the todo overlay UI and update any related styling or tests."}}]
Have Cursor audit the Discord bot todo sync logic
[{"name":"cursor_composer","arguments":{"prompt":"Audit the Discord bot todo sync logic for stale cache behavior and propose or implement a fix."}}]
Play focus music and set the living room to work mode
Show my overdue todos and any pending briefings
Check tomorrow's calendar and give me the weather for Friday too
Remind me to submit taxes on 2026-04-14 at 8pm

Play some lo-fi and set the bedroom lights to reading mode
Put on dinner music and switch the living room to relax mode
Turn off Light 1, turn off Light 2, and pause Spotify
Start a focus session with ambient music and work mode lights
Schedule a project sync tomorrow from 1pm to 2pm and text me to leave on time

[{"name":"calendar_data","arguments":{"commands":[{"read_or_write":"create_event","calendar":"morgan_personal","event_title":"Project sync","date":"tomorrow","start_time":"1pm","end_time":"2pm"}]}},{"name":"send_sms","arguments":{"message":"Leave on time for your project sync tomorrow"}}]

Find me a good lasagna recipe and add cook lasagna to my todo list for Sunday
Get directions to the airport and text me to leave early
Search for the Tailwind docs and send the refactor task to Cursor

[{"name":"google_search","arguments":{"query":"Tailwind CSS documentation","query_type":"link"}},{"name":"cursor_composer","arguments":{"prompt":"Refactor the current styling to use the Tailwind patterns you intended, preserving the existing behavior."}}]

[{"name":"read_clipboard","arguments":{}},{"name":"cursor_composer","arguments":{"prompt":"Clean up the todo overlay styles for readability and reduce duplicated CSS rules."}}]

Set repeat to off and skip to the next song
